inputs.text: Hand-painted anime-furry digital painting, semi-realistic painterly rendering                                           with visible loose brushstrokes and soft painted edges (lineless body, soft anime                                       line on the face).                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Portrait of an anthro maned wolf (Chrysocyon brachyurus): tall slender build, long                                      legs, large pointed ears, reddish-golden russet fur with natural black "stockings"                                      on the legs, black erect mane running down the neck and back, white throat patch and                                    white tail tip, dark muzzle line. Large expressive anime eyes with catchlights,                                         confident half-smile.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Stylish streetwear outfit: oversized cropped bomber jacket worn open over a fitted                                      graphic tank, high-waisted cargo pants, layered chains and a choker, fingerless                                         gloves — eye-catching fashion-illustration vibe.                                                                                                                                                                                                Fluffy fur rendered in soft clumps and visible strands, matte not glossy.                                                                                                                                                                       Setting: a neon-lit city alley at night after rain, glowing pink and teal signs                                         reflecting in wet asphalt, warm street-lamp glow. Warm golden rim/backlight from                                        behind making the fur edges and mane glow, cool blue shadows, subtle fill light on                                      the face, gentle bloom, soft floating bokeh. Painterly out-of-focus background,                                         medium shot. Looks like a human artist painted it.                                                                                                                                                                                              Avoid: 3D render, glossy plastic sheen, smooth airbrushed surface, flat cel shading,                                    photorealism.
